narrative:
Precinct Avon Lake City 4-C (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,045 registered voters, with 59.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.5 percentage points.
